event_name: Claude Code GitHub Action Secret Exposure
confidence_reason: Microsoft described the exposure path directly, but the public report did not include exact repository or workflow examples.

ci_cd_systems: workflows processing untrusted issue or pull-request content
credentials_at_risk: other workflow secrets reachable from the runner environment

artifact_analysis.execution_trigger: workflow content routed through the Claude Code GitHub Action Read tool
payload_behavior: reads runner environment through the assistant path
exposes workflow secret material if untrusted content is processed
uses version boundary v2.1.128 as the fixed release marker

ci_cd_hunts: workflow content routed through the Claude Code GitHub Action Read tool

open_questions: The public report did not include exact repository or workflow examples.
Broader exploitation beyond the described Read-tool path is not established in the supplied evidence.
defender_takeaways: Treat assistant-assisted workflow steps as secret-bearing execution contexts whenever they can inspect runner environment state.
Pin or update to the fixed release boundary before re-enabling jobs that process untrusted issue or pull-request content.
remediation_gates: Workflow definitions and runner logs are reviewed for the Read-tool exposure path.
Secret-bearing jobs are updated to the fixed release boundary and revalidated with clean telemetry.
